description.en: Create targeted marketing campaigns on WhatsApp. Support product launches, seasonal sales, win-backs, and customer loyalty dispatches.
description.pt: Execute campanhas de marketing promocional no WhatsApp com 98% de taxa de abertura e botões interativos.
description.es: Cree campañas de marketing promocionales en WhatsApp con 98% de tasa de abertura y botones interactivos.

description.tr: WhatsApp üzerinde %98 açılma oranı ve etkileşimli butonlarla pazarlama kampanyaları yürütün.

title.pt: Campanhas de Marketing com 98% de Abertura
title.es: Campañas de Marketing con 98% de Apertura

subtitle.en: Move beyond email's 20% open rate. WhatsApp marketing campaigns deliver 98% open rates, 45-60% click rates, and 3-5x higher conversion rates. Send rich media promotions with interactive buttons directly to your customers' phones.
subtitle.pt: Vá além dos 20% de abertura do email. Campanhas WhatsApp entregam 98% de abertura, 45-60% de cliques e conversões 3-5x maiores.
subtitle.es: Supere el 20% de apertura del email. Las campañas de WhatsApp entregan 98% de apertura, 45-60% de clics y conversiones 3-5x mayores.
subtitle.id: Melampaui 20% tingkat buka email. Kampanye WhatsApp memberikan 98% tingkat buka, 45-60% tingkat klik, dan konversi 3-5x lebih tinggi.
subtitle.ar: تجاوز معدل فتح البريد الإلكتروني 20%. حملات واتساب تحقق 98% فتح و45-60% نقرات وتحويلات أعلى 3-5 مرات.
subtitle.tr: E-postanın %20 açılma oranını aşın. WhatsApp pazarlama kampanyaları %98 açılma, %45-60 tıklanma ve 3-5 kat daha yüksek dönüşüm oranları sağlar.

body.en: WhatsApp marketing messages support rich media (images, videos, carousels), interactive buttons (quick reply, CTA), and personalization variables. Combined with audience segmentation and A/B testing, you can create highly targeted campaigns that drive real revenue.

bullets.en: Rich media support: product catalogs, images, PDFs

description.en: Create Template A (discount focus) and Template B (feature focus) inside our central templates dashboard.
Dispatch variants to a localized 10% test audience to measure engagement, clicks, and read success rates.
The system determines the winning template variant after 3 hours and dispatches it to the remaining 90% queue.

heading.en: WhatsApp Campaigns vs. Traditional SMS Marketing vs. Email Newsletters

question.en: What ROI can I expect from WhatsApp marketing?

answer.en: Businesses typically see 3-5x higher ROI from WhatsApp marketing compared to email campaigns. Key metrics: 98% open rate (vs 20% email), 45-60% click rate (vs 2-3% email), and 10-15% conversion rate for promotional offers. Abandoned cart recovery campaigns alone can recover 15-25% of lost sales.

question.en: What are the local restrictions on sending marketing campaigns?
question.in: How do pricing and templates work for WhatsApp marketing campaigns in India?
question.br: Quais as regras da LGPD para campanhas de marketing promocionais no Brasil?
question.mx: Existen restricciones de horario para enviar campañas de marketing en México?

answer.en: Marketing messages must always respect user opt-ins and be sent via official pre-approved templates.
answer.in: Meta charges a flat rate for marketing conversations in India, billed in Paise. There are no additional DLT charges or registration steps for WhatsApp marketing templates, unlike promotional SMS which are highly restricted.
answer.br: Sob a LGPD, campanhas promocionais exigem opt-in prévio e explícito do destinatário. Além disso, as mensagens devem incluir obrigatoriamente um botão claro de descadastramento (opt-out), permitindo que o usuário pare de receber ofertas com um único clique.
answer.mx: De acuerdo con las normativas de PROFECO en México, se recomienda programar y enviar campañas de marketing únicamente en horario comercial local (9:00 AM a 6:00 PM) para evitar reportes por spam y mantener la calidad del número.

subtext.en: Free plan. No credit card. 5-minute setup.
